{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305502623611C7EA76F74007B8D"}"},"total":8385},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7350558261399159577","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的真的很好看！也很真实，把现代人的无奈心酸描写的让人泪目！希望所有孩子都能活的和球球一样开心快乐！但现实的无奈让我们在书中去放松一下吧！希望作者大大加油啊！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1711521533,"group_id":"7339447717887757337","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx0BrQzlIEOEVbGvxl5f4MjdCbXC3Wh67DSztL2EM3n7","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1368215863964487","user_name":"昆仑派的小张哥"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1368215863964487","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7339447717887757337","book_info":{"abstract":"随着人们越来越重视娃的教育，一档名为《父爱如山》的直播真人秀开始了。
节目组分别随机抽取了一名80后，一名90后和一名00后的奶爸。
80后爸爸带娃主打一个全能，对女儿照顾的那叫一个无微不至体贴入微。
网友：“父爱如山呐，这爸爸是真给女儿遮风避雨呀！”
90后爸爸带娃主打一个随心，女儿想干啥干啥，不多问，不多管。
网友：“父爱如山呐，无条件的宠孩子，主打一个陪伴和快乐。”
而当镜头到了00后爸爸这边。
全网傻了。
萌萝莉眼含泪花：“口口声声说爱我，却骗我零花钱，你是我亲爹吗？”
董晨：“你真想知道？那你给我二百块。”
萌萝莉哭的更响了：“还有，谁家爸爸会给闺女取个名字叫董格球啊。”
董晨：“是不是有人说你名字不好听！他们懂个球！”
萌萝莉都哭抽抽了，董晨也不甘示弱。
“我劝你别哭，因为我哭起来，可你比嗓门大多了........”
坑娃一时爽，一直坑娃一直爽，网友都震惊了。
网友：“父爱如山呐，还踏马是火焰山！”
“爷奶提刀赶来中......”
“带娃节目？改名吧，这届爸爸真难带！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/aae2add67a0fa9d1c475c6ea0a10626f","author":"吃席不交份子钱","author_id":"","book_id":"7339447717887757337","book_name":"靠靠靠靠靠！谁教你这么当爹的","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8b8a8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":42,"name":"奶爸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=42&name=奶爸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7339705965370950206","read_count":"34021","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1422216"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"644","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,奶爸,直播","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e875525340daa65fefc77cb9ef497605~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779400226&x-signature=xw5KQ5Ofkh0uvtC5C4K%2B5p8dbFY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1292666185463275","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.6133428e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305502623611C7EA76F74007B8D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"
